name: Ventor's Gamble
explicitMods: +33 to maximum Life
13% reduced Rarity of Items found
+22% to Cold Resistance

flavourText: In a blaze of glory,
An anomaly defying all odds
The "unkillable" beast met the divine
And Ventor met his latest trophy.

name: The Dark Seer
explicitMods: +2 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems
10% Global chance to Blind Enemies on hit
Enemies Blinded by you have Malediction
+2 Maximum Energy Shield per Level
+1 Maximum Mana per Level

flavourText: Feed on the light of the living,
Bring darkness to all I see,
Until we are one in shadow.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Targets an allied player to apply a buff which links you to them for a duration. While linked, your Energy Shield will intercept some of the damage they would take. If the target dies while linked, you will also die. This skill cannot be triggered, or used by Totems, Traps, or Mines.
explicitMods: Base duration is 11.50 seconds
Linked target takes 15% less Damage
30% of Damage from Hits against target is taken from your Energy Shield before them

Link breaks if target leaves range or line of sight for 4 seconds
Maximum 1 Link from any source per target
You die if Linked target dies
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Physical, Guard

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: Base duration is 3.00 seconds
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 3270% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
Buff grants +909 to Armour

we must fight side by side as brothers.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, firing beams which deal damage to nearby enemies and those around them. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
explicitMods: Deals 150 to 449 Lightning Damage
Activates every 0.5 seconds while Attached
Increases and Reductions to Cast Speed also apply to this Skill's Activation frequency
Can be Attached for a total Duration of 5.00 seconds
Can be Detached for a total Duration of 6.00 seconds
Sends beams to 3 Enemies, including the Branded Enemy
Deals 80% more Damage with Hits against Branded Enemy

flavourText: Motion, purpose... craft. The fruits of my mind laboured
to build my wildest imaginings, never tiring, never faltering.
Life... or something like it, engineered in its image.

name: Maloney's Mechanism
explicitMods: Has 2 Sockets
Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
9% increased Attack Speed

5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks
flavourText: Midnight tinkering begets midday murdering;
a sinister shaft surreptitiously shot slays a scoundrel.
I will see them again, but not until my work is done.
